label: Watch
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily video, a stream, a show, a film, a talk, a documentary, or another media item the user likely wants to watch. If a video is mainly instructional and the medium is incidental, use Learn instead.

label: Read
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily an article, post, document, newsletter, thread, book, or other text the user likely wants to read or consume. If the clear purpose is learning a topic, skill, method, tutorial, explainer, or playbook, use Learn instead.

label: Visit
llm_description: Use when the saved item is primarily a concrete place, venue, restaurant, shop, destination, or location the user likely wants to physically visit. Do not use merely because an event, class, show, workout, or activity has a venue; use Do for the activity or Plan for logistics.

label: Buy
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a product, listing, deal, store page, or purchasing option the user likely wants to buy or consider buying. For reviews, comparisons, and buying guides, use Read or Learn unless one concrete purchase target dominates.

label: Cook
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a recipe, meal idea, cooking technique, grocery prep, or other food preparation the user likely wants to cook. Use Visit for restaurants or cafes, and Learn only for food education where making the food is not the main action.

label: Make
llm_description: Use when the saved item is a DIY project, craft, build guide, code pattern, template, design, or other artifact the user likely wants to create. Do not use for recipes, workouts, stretches, routines, physical therapy, or pure conceptual learning.

label: Do
llm_description: Use when the saved item is something the user likely wants to perform, including physical therapy, workouts, stretches, routines, practices, meditations, exercises, drills, classes, concerts, workshops, performances, shows, or scheduled activities.

label: Plan
llm_description: Use when the saved item supports planning a trip, event, appointment, itinerary, booking, schedule, logistics, renewal, checklist, or admin follow-through. Do not use for generic text unless it clearly supports a future arrangement or decision.

label: Learn
llm_description: Use when the saved item is explanatory or educational material where understanding a topic, method, concept, tutorial, playbook, or skill is the clear reason for saving. Learn takes precedence over Read when the text is mainly instructional or conceptual.

label: Share
llm_description: Legacy intent for captures once classified as something to send, show, recommend, or discuss. Do not use for new analysis or correction chips.

label: Research
llm_description: Legacy broad investigation intent. Use Learn for clear educational material, or leave intent blank when no concrete action is inferable.

label: Reference
llm_description: Legacy broad lookup intent. Leave intent blank unless a clearer active action such as Read, Plan, Learn, Make, Cook, or Do applies.

label: Remember
llm_description: Legacy broad memory intent. Leave intent blank when no specific active action is inferable.

label: Follow up
llm_description: Legacy task intent. Use Plan for booking, scheduling, logistics, renewals, or admin follow-through; otherwise leave intent blank unless another active action applies.
